share_tropa.title: Rally the Troops
share_tropa.subtitle: Heart Club · Global Football Census
share_tropa.banner_alt: Ambassador Journey — Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond
share_tropa.invite_text:
⚽ YOU'VE BEEN DRAFTED TO HEART CLUB! 🧡

I just voted for our team! Heart Club is the biggest fan census in the world.

HOW IT WORKS:
1️⃣ Click the link below and cast your vote.
2️⃣ Vote for your Heart Club ❤️ AND up to 4 Sympathy Clubs 🧡
3️⃣ After voting, you get a unique Invite Code.
4️⃣ Click 'Rally the Troops' and call your friends.

The more people vote with your invite, the more points you earn to level up: Bronze ➔ Silver ➔ Gold ➔ DIAMOND! 💎

Diamond Ambassadors will get exclusive rewards in the future. Let's dominate the ranking!

👇 VOTE NOW AND RALLY:

testar.title: Test Club • Heart Club
testar.disclaimer: Vote not counted. Your Heart Club remains intact.

correction.intro: Suggest corrections to your club's official data. Our system (AI + Google) will check each field before saving. If you make a mistake, AI fixes it; absurd suggestions are rejected. Leave blank what you don't want to change.
correction.colors_examples: black, white, red, navy blue, flag green...
correction.color_invalid: Color "{{val}}" not recognized. Use HEX (#RRGGBB) or a name (e.g., black, blue, red).
correction.rivals_placeholder: Search rival club in the database (crest guaranteed)...
correction.rivals_disclaimer: Fan corrections are applied directly, without AI validation, and flagged in the admin panel.
correction.no_vote_desc: Vote for your heart club first.
correction.nothing_desc: Fill in at least one field.

rules.title: Promotion Rules — Brazilian Série B 2026
rules.direct_body: The round-robin format with home and away legs (38 rounds) remains the base. Only the Champion and Runner-up secure an automatic spot in Série A 2027.
rules.playoff_body: The other two remaining top-flight spots will be decided in a knockout tournament after the group stage. Clubs finishing between 3rd and 6th face each other in two-legged ties:
rules.playoff_advantage: Advantage: the better-ranked sides (3rd and 4th) host the return leg.
rules.playoff_outcome: Outcome: the two winners earn promotion to Série A. There is no final between them — the playoff only defines the last two promoted clubs.
